caption: A news broadcast shows a man in a white short-sleeved shirt sitting in the driver's seat of a car, seen from a side profile. He is holding the steering wheel and appears to be speaking. The scene is framed by news graphics. A red banner at the top reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'", and a large yellow "BREAKING NEWS" banner runs across the bottom. To the left is a photo of a man with glasses, labeled "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार". To the right, photos of other men are shown under the heading "मंत्री", including "संतोष सुमन" and "सुमित कुमार". A timestamp in the bottom right corner reads "10:07 PM" next to a "MAHAGOW" logo. Across the sequence, the man in the car continues to speak and move slightly, while the on-screen graphics remain largely static, though the names under the "मंत्री" section shift slightly in the final frame to include "प्रेम कुमार" and "विजय चौधरी".
